chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3613 - وَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "اَلْمَعُونَةُ تَنْزِلُ مِنَ اَلسَّمَاءِ عَلَى قَدْرِ اَلْمَئُونَةِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3613 - Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said: "Assistance descends from the heavens in proportion to one's needs."
